li.xpath: Defs/PawnKindDef[defName="WK_Spacefarer_Grunt" or defName="WK_Spacefarer_Gunner" or defName="WK_Spacefarer_Sniper" or defName="WK_Spacefarer_Thumper" or defName="WK_Spacefarer_Marine" or defName="WK_Spacefarer_Grenadier" or defName="WK_Spacefarer_Jumper" or defName="WK_Spacefarer_Mechanitor"]/xenotypeSet/xenotypeChances
